zh.Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾比阿康斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas William Bulstrode於大約1405年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親John Bulstrode20歲，母親Agnes Burdfnell12歲。他於大約1430年與Agnes Norreys在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾比阿康斯費爾德享年74歲。

zh-hans.Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾比阿康斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas William Bulstrode于大约1405年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲John Bulstrode20岁，母亲Agnes Burdfnell12岁。他于大约1430年与Agnes Norreys在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1478年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾比阿康斯費爾德享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bulstrode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bolstridge
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Bulstrode, a habitational name from Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, meaning ‘bull marsh’ from Old English bula ‘bull’ + strōd ‘marshy land’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas William Bulstrode was born about 1405, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, John Bulstrode, was 20 and his mother, Agnes Burdfnell, was 12. He married Agnes Norreys about 1430, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1478, in Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas William Bulstrode est né environ 1405, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Bulstrode, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes Burdfnell, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Norreys environ 1430, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1478, à Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas William Bulstrode um 1405 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Bulstrode 20 und seine Mutter Agnes Burdfnell 12. Er hat um 1430 in England Agnes Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1478 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas William Bulstrode è nato il circa 1405 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, John Bulstrode, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Burdfnell, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Norreys circa 1430, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1478, nel Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas William Bulstrodeが約1405年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Bulstrodeは20歳，母Agnes Burdfnellは12歳であった。約1430年にイギリスでAgnes Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアビーコンスフィールドで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas William Bulstrode(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bulstrode(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Burdfnell(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1430년 영국에서 Agnes Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 브이콘스필드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas William Bulstrode nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bulstrode, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Burdfnell, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Norreys aproximadamente 1430, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1478, em Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas William Bulstrode родился около 1405 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Bulstrode было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Burdfnell, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Norreys около 1430 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1478 г. в местности бикунсфиелд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas William Bulstrode nació aproximadamente 1405, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bulstrode, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes Burdfnell, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Agnes Norreys aproximadamente 1430, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1478, en Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
